sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for NES port

special_mechanics.name: Power Pellet
special_mechanics.description: Large flashing energizers that turn ghosts blue and vulnerable; effect duration decreases with progression

special_mechanics.name: Warp Tunnels
special_mechanics.description: Side passages allowing Pac-Man and ghosts to traverse to opposite screen side

special_mechanics.name: Difficulty Progression
special_mechanics.description: Ghost speed increases and power pellet duration decreases as levels progress

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/qualitative data only. Wikipedia source contains general gameplay description but no precise physics parameters, velocities, or acceleration values. NES port-specific movement data not documented in available source.
sources_used: wikipedia - Pac-Man general article (gameplay section only)
